general: For those born in the Year of the Pig, the clash with Tai Sui (the Grand Duke Jupiter) during the Year of the Snake meant a year filled with ups and downs, especially for those who didn't experience weddings, births, property purchases, or start businesses. Fortunately, the Year of the Horse brings no direct conflict with Tai Sui, suggesting a chance to regain stability and reorganize one's situation. This is particularly beneficial for those who experienced emotional entanglements or job changes, as the new year promises stability. Those who had joyous events in the Year of the Snake will find their happiness continuing, with overall fortune gradually improving. The Year of the Horse also brings two auspicious stars, promising advancement and progress in various fields for those born in the Year of the Pig. The first, "Yue De," is a star associated with helpful benefactors, representing compassion and harmony, transforming misfortune into good fortune. It indicates improved interpersonal relationships, with helpful people assisting in smooth progress and fostering the repair of existing connections. For those who changed jobs or started businesses during a year of conflict with Tai Sui, the Year of the Horse signifies better adaptation to new environments and significantly increased work engagement. Under the auspicious star "Yu Tang," symbolizing wealth and abundance, salaried workers will be able to showcase their talents in the workplace, with potential increases in both power and salary. Business people will also be able to expand their wealth through connections, naturally leading to a rise in income. As for those who ended their relationships in the Year of the Horse, the support of "Yue De" will provide opportunities to expand their social circles, but romantic luck may not be particularly strong. Therefore, even if there is someone you like, you need to spend more time getting to know them and avoid rushing things. Although with the help of auspicious stars, all aspects of fortune will improve overall. However, the Year of the Horse will also face the influence of inauspicious stars such as "Jie Sha," "Si Fu," and "Xiao Hao." People born in the Year of the Pig need to pay special attention to their health, guarding against minor injuries or other minor illnesses. They should also pay close attention to the health of their elders and accompany them to the doctor promptly if they feel unwell. The "Minor Loss" star symbolizes slight financial losses. Although the Year of the Horse brings more stability and income growth compared to the Year of the Snake, and a significant improvement in past situations where income couldn't cover expenses, there will still be considerable extra costs. Therefore, it's crucial to live within your means and manage your finances prudently. Overall, in the Year of the Horse, those born under the Pig sign have overcome the conflict with Tai Sui and their fortunes have stabilized. With the strong influence of auspicious stars, their career, finances, and interpersonal relationships will gradually improve. However, due to the influence of "Minor Loss," financial fortunes may fluctuate. Since financial losses are inevitable, and "Death Talisman" has a greater impact on family and health, it's recommended that those born under the Pig sign perform good deeds and use funds for health management or purchasing desired items, proactively "spending money for joy" to improve their fortune. In terms of investment, it's best to choose stable medium- to long-term projects and avoid venturing into high-risk speculative markets. Remember, if you can adjust your pace, be cautious in all matters, and actively seize current opportunities, the Year of the Horse will surely be a year of progress.
career: Under the influence of the Year of the Snake, those born in the Year of the Pig faced numerous challenges in their social relationships, leaving them feeling isolated and helpless, and frequently experiencing setbacks. Their interpersonal relationships will gradually improve. For office workers, logical thinking will become clearer, supervisors will show more care, and arguments among colleagues will significantly decrease, leading to improved overall cooperation and greater support at work, resulting in better performance. Those who chose to change jobs or start businesses during the clash year will gradually adapt to new environments in the Year of the Horse, integrating into the new company culture and improving their work performance. Besides the improved interpersonal relationships greatly benefiting career development, the Year of the Horse also benefits from the auspicious star "Yu Tang," which can help expand financial resources. Office workers, in particular, can expect satisfactory salary adjustments through their networks and abilities. Those in frontline sales, intermediaries, self-media, or those who profit from their expertise will also see a significant increase in performance due to the influence of auspicious stars in the Year of the Horse. However, despite this, the inauspicious star "Minor Loss" still exists, potentially posing a risk of financial loss. Therefore, while generating income, it's crucial to learn how to save on expenses, especially for business owners who should cut unnecessary spending to maintain a balance between income and expenditure. Due to the powerful influence of auspicious stars, superiors, colleagues, and subordinates will provide ample support, leading to a more significant development in career prospects in the Year of the Horse compared to the Year of the Snake. This will also allow you to establish a clear direction for your future. Therefore, it is advised that those born in the Year of the Pig seize this rare opportunity, remain steadfast in their positions, and proactively move forward. The future looks very promising, laying a solid foundation for your future career.

Especially with the help of the benefactor "Yue De," interpersonal relationships will be smooth, making work more efficient. In the workplace, employees can achieve satisfactory salary increases through outstanding performance; business people can leverage their networks to open up new sources of income within their existing business scope; and those working in sales and intermediaries can gain customer support, thereby improving performance. Therefore, the primary income of all industries will increase. As for secondary income, with the assistance of benefactors who will provide valuable information or advice, coupled with sound judgment and decisions, the chances of profiting in the investment market will also increase. In addition, due to the presence of the inauspicious star "Minor Loss," which represents minor losses, and the "Death Talisman," which affects the home, those born in the Year of the Pig may wish to spend more on health management or seek medical treatment to proactively reduce losses and resist the influence of the inauspicious stars.

Entering the Year of the Horse, fortune is expected to stabilize, thanks to the auspicious star "Yue De," which brings good luck and protection from misfortune. Both physical and mental health may improve; simply pay attention to throat, trachea, and respiratory issues, and be wary of allergic reactions. However, the inauspicious stars "Jie Sha" and "Si Fu" remain, negatively impacting family fortune and posing a threat to health. Those born in the Year of the Pig should strengthen their health management and consider purchasing medical and accident insurance in advance for unforeseen circumstances. In the new year, pay close attention to the health of elders, arranging thorough health checkups and actively engaging in medical assistance to help others and enhance your own blessings. Since the family's feng shui is generally average, avoid contact with the Five Yellow (South) and Two Black (Northwest) illness stars in the Year of the Horse. If the main entrance or door is located in these illness positions, place copper objects or heavy items, or a copper gourd, to neutralize the negative influence. Furthermore, since the "Minor Loss" star enters the Rooster position, it will affect wealth. Therefore, it is recommended to proactively renovate your home and those of your elders, repair damaged appliances, or replace personal items such as sofas, mattresses, and curtains. These actions can help improve your fortune. Although overall health is not a major concern, some work-related stress is unavoidable. Therefore, it is recommended to engage in stress-relieving exercises such as Tai Chi and yoga to relax your mind and body, and also spend more time outdoors in nature to use positive energy to repair negative emotions.
relationship: Having passed through a significant emotional stage, some people born in the Year of the Pig may experience changes in their relationships. As the saying goes, "One joy can ward off three disasters, but without joy, trouble will ensue." If you established a family with your partner in the Year of the Snake, you will continue to enjoy auspicious fortune in the Year of the Horse. If you have plans to have a child, you can consider putting them into action. If you ended a relationship in a conflicting year, the Year of the Horse will also present new opportunities. It is recommended to process your feelings and start afresh. Although the Year of the Horse is not a year of abundant romance, fortunately, the powerful "Moon Virtue" auspicious star provides assistance. However, marriage in the Year of the Horse is not the type to unfold quickly or be pursued intensely. Therefore, even if you meet someone you like, you should avoid rushing things. It is recommended to start as friends, spend more time getting to know each other and cultivating feelings, and then take things further when the time is right. Such relationships usually last longer. Married individuals will enjoy stable relationships with their partners, with harmonious interactions. Reduced personal worries lead to a more optimistic and positive outlook. They will be able to calmly seek consensus when facing disagreements, resulting in significantly less friction compared to the Year of the Snake. Although the new year will still be affected by the inauspicious star "Death Talisman" influencing the health of family members and elders, fortunately, both partners will be able to work together to resolve issues. If feeling stressed, it is advisable to share with your partner and consider traveling together to relax. Overall, it will be a sweet and enjoyable year.
